title: Directly convert between SkM44 and sk_matrix44_t
body:
**Description of Change**

The classes are exactly the same size and layout, so we can do this. It is a fraction faster and it removes all the need for the code.

**SkiaSharp Issue**

<!--
    Provide links to SkiaSharp issues here.
    Ensure that a GitHub issue was created for your feature or bug fix before sending PR.
-->

Related to https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/issues/2778

**API Changes**

None.
